# Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? Keep it short — 1-3 bullets. -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Docs / CI / infra only

## Checklist

- [ ] `flutter analyze` passes
- [ ] `flutter test` passes (new code covered where practical)
- [ ] `cargo fmt && cargo clippy -- -D warnings` pass (if Rust touched)
- [ ] No secrets committed; `.env` untouched or explicitly justified
- [ ] If the schema changed, a new migration is added under `supabase/migrations/`
- [ ] Telemetry events added for any new user-visible failure path

## Test plan

1. Steps to reproduce the scenario
